chunks.title: Deliverance from a Guarantor
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit advising on how to escape the consequences of becoming a guarantor for another.

chunks.title: The Lesson of the Ant
chunks.reason: A short narrative illustration using the ant to warn against laziness and predict poverty.

chunks.title: Character of the Vile Person
chunks.reason: A descriptive speech defining the behavior and sudden judgment of a wicked man.

chunks.title: Seven Abominations
chunks.reason: A structured list of seven specific things that Yahweh hates.

chunks.title: Keep the Commandments
chunks.reason: Advice to internalize parental instruction as a guide and protection from the adulteress.

chunks.title: The Consequences of Adultery
chunks.reason: An extended argument using analogies and consequences to warn against the allure of a foreign woman.
